text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's all up in the air, like a windswept storm of
sakura petals—the Oka Sho's namesake.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea how it's gonna go down, Trainer,
but let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka is running in the Oka Sho. If she's still
eyeing the Derby afterward, we'll have an
impossible decision to make.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But since she's decided to run, we've got no other
choice!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The Oka Sho... Looks like a G1 race can still
shake me. It feels just like when I ran in the
Hanshin J.F.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But you know what, Trainer? My way of thinkin'
has changed since back then.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Back then, I didn't care if I lost, so long as I
tried—just like you taught me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If you hadn't said that, I wouldn't even have been
able to move my feet. But now...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now I feel like that's not enough anymore—like I
shouldn't go into races expecting to lose.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I'm gonna run, I wanna win. Especially if Scarlet
is gonna be runnin' too...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna be fine with losin'. I'm gonna go in
strong and come out the winner!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, thanks! I'm not a newbie anymore, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm not ready to flutter down like a cherry
blossom. I couldn't take it if I fell while Scarlet
bloomed.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm here for you, Scarlet. I chose you over the
Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So show me everything you've got—and I'll show
you what I can really do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's once reckless coolness has stabilized into
something firmer—stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus, her first Classic race against her biggest
rival, Daiwa Scarlet, begins!
